title: load_status issues N+1 queries per post
description: posting.rs load_status() (line 672) is called once per post in fetch_paginated_statuses() (line 922 loop). For each post it does: fetch account row, fetch media, fetch tags, fetch mentions, check favourites/boosts/bookmarks, check pinned, load reblog (recursive), load card. This is classic N+1: a timeline of 20 posts produces ~160+ DB queries. For a single-user SQLite server the latency is likely tolerable, but it is the wrong complexity class — the fix is to batch-load media/tags/mentions for the full page in a single IN(...) query each.
close_reason: Deferred: performance optimization, not correctness. Timeline pages are small (20 posts).
